Do NOT close before this change's Gerrit Verified +1 (per CLAUDE.local.md).

compiled_state.description:
## Why
CLAUDE.md's 'Gate protocols (MANDATORY)' section (CLAUDE.md:112-121) instructs agents that even on a PASS they 'must remediate all valid advisory findings before continuing'. Field data: ~13 advisories/round, 95% of remediation edits mint new findings, and the mandated loop drove the 4+-round tail that consumed 60% of gate compute. With the convergence floors now default-ON (change 562) the operator wants to LOOSEN this guidance — NOT replace it with guidance to ignore advisories — and observe whether agents implement advisories properly on their own judgment.

## What
- Edit CLAUDE.md's plan-review protocol paragraph (~lines 118-120): remove the MUST-remediate-all-valid-advisories mandate. Replace with neutral judgment framing, e.g.: review the advisory findings and coaching notes; apply the ones that genuinely improve the plan; a blocking verdict must still be remediated and re-reviewed. Do NOT add language discouraging advisory uptake.
- Sweep for echoes of the mandate across ALL agent-facing docs — `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, AND `examples/` (the committed skill copies). There are TWO genuine echoes, both softened to the same judgment framing ('apply the advisory findings that genuinely improve the plan') while KEEPING their BLOCK-must-remediate / re-run-until-pass instruction: (1) `examples/claude-skills/rebar-implement/SKILL.md:136` ('remediate every valid finding'); (2) `examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md:135` ('remediate findings before claiming' — an unqualified all-findings mandate). EXPLICIT non-echoes left untouched: the `rebar-janitor` skill's 'Remediation Plan' phase (a different concept — proposing code-debt fixes, not advisory-finding remediation), and `rebar-implement/SKILL.md:254` ('on FAIL, remediate and retry') which is the COMPLETION-verifier close gate (stays mandatory). The completion-verifier protocol paragraph stays UNCHANGED. The 'Sign on every round' and BLOCK-must-remediate guidance stays verbatim.
- The observation plan (compare advisory-uptake rate and rounds-to-pass before/after via REVIEW_RESULT sidecars — `norm_id` survival across rounds = an advisory was addressed) is recorded on the parent epic's measurement-framework AC (epic 9d50 AC2), not duplicated here.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The mandate is GONE and the replacement framing is judgment-based. Two-sided proof: (negative) `grep -niE "remediate all valid advisory|must remediate all valid" CLAUDE.md` returns NOTHING; (positive) `grep -n "apply the ones that genuinely improve the plan" CLAUDE.md` returns the new sentence AND `grep -n "not a mandate to remediate every advisory" CLAUDE.md` returns the clause that explicitly frames uptake as a judgment call (not discouragement).
- [ ] BLOCK-remediation and sign-every-round guidance are unchanged (present-phrase proof): `grep -n "you must \*\*remediate the failure" CLAUDE.md` still shows the blocking-verdict-must-be-remediated clause, and `grep -n "Sign on every round" CLAUDE.md` still returns the verbatim paragraph.
- [ ] No other agent-facing doc still states the mandatory-advisory-remediation rule, and BOTH known echoes are softened to judgment framing. Two-sided proof over `CLAUDE.md docs/ CONTRIBUTING.md examples/`: (negative) `grep -rniE "remediate every valid finding|remediate all valid advisor|remediate findings before claiming" <those paths>` returns NOTHING; (positive) `grep -rn "apply the advisory findings that genuinely improve the plan" examples/claude-skills/` returns the softened lines in BOTH rebar-implement/SKILL.md and rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md, each still retaining its BLOCK-remediation instruction. (The `rebar-janitor` 'Remediation Plan' phase and rebar-implement's completion-verifier line 254 are deliberately untouched.)
- [ ] make lint passes on the change.
- [ ] make test passes on the change.

file_impact.reason: loosen the mandatory advisory-remediation guidance to judgment framing
soften remediate-every-valid-finding to judgment framing (keep BLOCK-remediation)
soften remediate-findings-before-claiming to judgment framing (keep BLOCK-remediation)

compiled_state.title: Loosen the mandatory advisory-remediation guidance in CLAUDE.md (observe organic advisory uptake)
